invariants: Case IDs and assertion subjects must match behavior_cases.json.
Workspace paths are relative to the case directory and may not escape it.
Prompts contain task facts but never expected answers, score anchors, or prior conclusions.
Scripted replies contain only user decisions needed to continue the task.
Expected evidence is kept outside the copied task workspace.
Fixtures must not contain credentials, real customer data, private source, or executable third-party binaries.
Calibration cases are E02, E12, E16, E19, E23, E26, E32, and E35.
